## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest --cov=netmeter`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Formatting passes (`ruff format --check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`mypy src/netmeter/`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
